brief_justification: Paper A is a combinatorial graph-clustering algorithm (overlapping community detection that exploits a sparse backbone subgraph of a discrete node-edge network), whereas Paper B is a continuum advection-diffusion PDE for bio-heat transfer in tissue (blood-enthalpy transport plus thermal diffusion characterized by a Peclet number); there is no discrete network, clustering, or backbone in B and no continuous transport equation in A, so beyond the incidental word 'network' no role-for-role machinery corresponds.
